text: Implemented gale.backend contract (core/shared): Capability enum, DenseDoubleKernel surface forwarding verbatim to DoubleKernels (PureDenseDoubleKernel), BackendThresholds/PureThresholds (native crossovers = MaxValue), BackendConfig (singleThreaded default), Backend trait (acceleratesGemm = NativeBlas||Vectorized, spectral bridge, compose), PureBackend, given pure. NO facade seam wired into DMat.* yet (deliberate — no-import path byte-identical). Fresh-context review: SAFE TO COMMIT, no forwarding/compose/visibility bugs; closed its advisable gaps (NativeBlas-only acceleratesGemm, spectral-bridge positive test, all 6 L1/L2 forwards, strided-gemm, multi-part compose; deliberate compose config=primary comment). Cross-platform green: coreJVM 358, coreJS 355.
